title: Amber Garden
description: a fall vibe for the Pale Garden
body:
The greatest innovation in Minecraft Autumn resource packs has arrived! This resource pack transforms the Pale Garden biome from a dreary place with an evil creature lurking within to a beautiful warm place with an evil creature lurking within. Leave behind your orange birch leaves, and join the lovely world of Butternut Wood, Yellow Moss, and a fog described by some as "far less haunting".
![autumnal themed pale garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e26093f9e32c3f31d69795a7fddffaa61630e18b.png)
